checkin.journal:
Woke up late, slept well after 2 pm,
First time slept in Villa Sch. - was so - so
Was reporting bugs in morning
Figuring out the machines, trash - making breakfast, finding bugs
Drive to Pula
Lunch - was so so - they didnt had much for me to eat - maybe I go for meat next time
Nappy but instead had a depression moments again - just feeling I cant be happy about anything in this life, strange feeling which just makes me depressed because then whats the point of setting goals if reaching them is n
